calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-20-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Minor's Compromise hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, CSR #5162.

Michael E. Hale, Esq. appeared for petitioner Peter Peng, Guardian ad litem for Iain Peng, the minor Claimant.
Petitioner Peter Peng was not present at today's hearing.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $5,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,121.47.
Medical Expenses - $514.31.
Costs $0.00
A net balance of $3,364.22 shall be disbursed in one check made payable to claimant's mother, Linda Peng. This constitutes the net settlement amount.

Order Approving Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minow was submitted to and signed by the Court.
